name: full_retinaface_review
notes: Use after local official reference images, generated candidates, and reviewed subject folders exist.
This config keeps model/evaluation deterministic for continuity and adds neural backend rank agreement through compare-backends.
deepface-retinaface uses DeepFace ArcFace embeddings with RetinaFace detection; expect slower runtime than OpenCV detector paths.
Raw, generated, and subject comparison images remain Git-ignored.
